title: CarTrade Capital India is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)

jsonLd.title: CarTrade Capital India is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Join the CarTrade Capital India family as a E-commerce Executive in Srinagar. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About CarTrade Capital India:
CarTrade Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CarTrade Capital India!
